subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted to the Truth! Your letter was received, conveying the news of the arrival of Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Jalal and Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Hassan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبان نامه رسید از ورود جناب آقا سید جلال و جناب آقا سید حسن خبر داده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
